newsSince: On June 8, 2026 ASMPT secured a repeat order for eight chip-to-wafer (C2W) Thermo-Compression Bonding tools from a leading IDM for advanced client/datacentre CPUs, building on Firebird TCB HVM use since 2024. Q1 2026 revenue rose 32% YoY to $507.9M with bookings up 71.6% to $727M, AI-driven. This strengthens the advanced-packaging/chiplet bottleneck case.

sources.label: ASMPT repeat C2W TCB order (press release)

verdicts.rankRationale: New since Jun 9: repeat C2W TCB order (Jun 8) for advanced CPUs plus Q1 bookings +71.6%. TCB/advanced packaging is core to the CPO/AI-connectivity adjacency lens, reinforcing the choke-point thesis. Modest up despite 140% YTD, which already prices much upside.
verdicts.bull: Firebird/TCB sole-source momentum into HBM, chiplet and now advanced CPUs; bookings +71.6% signal a multi-quarter order cycle.
verdicts.neutral: Strong orders but +140% YTD and $9.4B cap leave thinner asymmetry; single-bundle validation risk persists.
verdicts.bear: Lumpy WFE order book; advanced-packaging competition (besi, others) and a sharp rerating cap residual alpha.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Repeat TCB tool orders / HBM and chiplet packaging ramp
